form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on March 5 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Nikovo carrying 57.5kg at $10. Before that 4th of 12 at this track on February 20 over 1600m, 3 len behind Dosman with 59.5kg at $12. Hard to fault if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-16). Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on March 5 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Nikovo carrying 57.5kg at $10. Before that 4th of 12 at this track on February 20 over 1600m, 3 len behind Dosman with 59.5kg at $12. Hard to fault if at his best.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Legal Reform with 59.5kg at $2.60. The run before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at this track February 20 over 1400m defeating I Still Have Faith carrying 61kg at $4.50. Leading prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-13.5). Form hard to fault. Last start 2nd in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Legal Reform with 59.5kg at $2.60. The run before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 0.5 len at this track February 20 over 1400m defeating I Still Have Faith carrying 61kg at $4.50. Leading prospect.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Haydock Park September 27 over 1600m, 10 len behind Fondo Blanco carrying 53kg at $9.50. When resuming last campaign second of 7 at this track April 6 2025 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Dividend with 60kg at $19. Looks a key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-20). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 10 at Haydock Park September 27 over 1600m, 10 len behind Fondo Blanco carrying 53kg at $9.50. When resuming last campaign second of 7 at this track April 6 2025 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Dividend with 60kg at $19. Looks a key runner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Suffered interference approximately one furlong after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last outing second last of 7 at Wolverhampton on March 13 over 1700m, 8 len behind Borgi with 61kg at $2.30. At only start last preparation 6th of 8 at Thirsk on May 17 over 1600m, 9 len behind Mirsky carrying 60.5kg at $5. Will take a lot from that run and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Suffered interference inside the final furlong.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Newmarket (Rowley) November 1 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Nyman with 62.5kg at $7. First up last campaign third of 8 at this track March 19 2025 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Cracking Gold carrying 56.5kg at $26. Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last preparation eighth of 10 at this track January 20 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Hundred Caps with 61kg at $10. Previous preparation first-up won by neck Kempton Park All Weather December 10 over 1400m defeating Waistcoat carrying 61kg at $19. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 8 at Chelmsford December 18 over 2000m, 13 len behind Parlando with 59kg at $13. First up last campaign second of 12 at Chelmsford August 28 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Estmrar carrying 60kg at $6. Doubt he will have much to offer first up.
